titleStmt.title: SII 6.937: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 937. (A.R. No. 302 of 1899).The record is flanked by IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . U¨rvvīśāḥ pū¨rvvamāsan mahitaguṇagaṇā matsyavaṁśāvataṁsā sthitvā tatsāmyasīmāsaraṇimiha jagatya
¨rjjunakṣōṇipālaḥ . kī¨rttyā jāga¨rtti saṁpratyarinṛpavijayaprāptalakṣmīvilāsaśśrīgōpīnāthasēvārasajanitanijaprā
jyarājyaprabhāvaḥ . 1 sōyamannamabhūbha¨rttu¨rvvaikuṇṭapadavījuṣaḥ gōpālava¨rddhanākhyasya puṇyaṁ lipsu¨ryyavīya
saḥ . 2 svasti śrīśākava¨rṣē śṛtiśaśinayanakṣmāmitē kā¨rttikākhyē māsē mīnadhvajāhē naraharivapuṣa
ssiṁhaśailēśvarasya . triṁśaddhēmārudārāssavidhabhuvi sadākhaṁḍadīpapradīptyai prādāduddāmasaṁ
ppannṛharimunimanaḥpū¨rvvamācaṁdratāraṁ . 3 Amuma¨rjunabhūpālani¨rmmitaṁ dha¨rmmamuttamaṁ .
Atratyā vaiṣṇavāssa¨rvvē pālayaṁttu prāyatnataḥ . 4 svasti śrī.śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1214 gunēṁṭi kā¨rttika
śukla trayōdaśiyu śanaiścaravāramunāṁḍu Oḍḍavādi narasiṁhava¨rddhanuṁḍaina A
¨rjjunadēvamahārājulu tama tammuṁḍu gōpālava¨rddhanuṁḍaina Annamarāju śrīvaiku
ṁṭhapadaprāptuṁḍaina Itaniki puṇyābhivṛddhigānu śrīnarasiṁhanāthunu divyasannidhiAṁddu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigāThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 6.937 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
